name: Black Hawk County YMCA
description: Black Hawk County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Waterloo, IA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Open play every day of the week, and on Sunday afternoons!! Morning time hours to become available on the first week of April!!
fees: Fee required — $10 drop in fee, or $50 for a ten punch card

name: Black Hawk Tennis Club - Waterloo
description: Black Hawk Tennis Club - Waterloo is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waterloo, IA. There are 4 indoor courts.

name: Cedar Falls Recreation Center
description: Cedar Falls Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cedar Falls, IA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cedar Valley Sportsplex
description: Come play pickleball at Cedar Valley Sportsplex in Waterloo, IA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Fit Courts
description: Fit Courts is a place to play pickleball in Cedar Falls, IA.

name: Nazareth Lutheran Church
description: Nazareth Lutheran Church is a place to play pickleball in Cedar Falls, IA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Orchard Hill Park
description: Orchard Hill Park is a place to play pickleball in Cedar Falls, IA. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Waterloo SUCKS
description: Waterloo SUCKS is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waterloo, IA. There are 7 courts. 1 is outdoors and 6 are indoors.
